divisions.title: Suffering and Hope
divisions.summary: New birth into living hope, chosen people and royal priesthood, suffering for doing good as Christ suffered for us

divisions.title: Submission and Witness
divisions.summary: Submission in relationships, suffering for righteousness, living for God's will, shepherding the flock with humility

chapterSummaries.1: Living hope through the resurrection, refined faith, love Christ though you have not seen him
chapterSummaries.2: Chosen people, living stones, submit to authorities, follow Christ's example in suffering
chapterSummaries.3: Wives and husbands, bless those who persecute, Christ preached to spirits in prison
chapterSummaries.4: Live for God's will, rejoice in sharing Christ's sufferings, judgment begins with God's household
chapterSummaries.5: Elders shepherd the flock, humble yourselves, resist the devil, God will restore you
